name: MCP Client
description: Discover and interact with external tools via MCP (Model Context Protocol)

tools.name: list_mcp_servers
tools.description: List all configured MCP server connections and their status

tools.name: call_mcp_tool
tools.description: Call a tool on a connected MCP server. Use list_mcp_servers first to see available servers and tools.

tool.description: Name of the tool to call (original name, not namespaced)

arguments.description: Arguments to pass to the tool
